context: Name of the to be translated language
%s will be replaced with the title of the screen (Example: Library Screen)
Single quotes (') are there for emphasis on the sound of the letters that will be spoken.

Destroy a Ghast with a fireball

Úsáid "@a" chun díriú ar gach imreoir

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Is riachtanach bheith i d'oibreoir (op) i mód cruthaitheach

translation: Níl bloic ordaithe i bhfeidhm ar an bhfreastalaí seo

Úsáid "@s" don aonán forghniomhaithe a aimsiú

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Tabhair faoi deara! Nuair a shíneoidh tú an leabhar, ní bheidh tú in ann é a athrú.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks

translation: Ní féidir teachtaireacht comhráite a sheoladh

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mian leat an suíomh gréasáin seo a oscailt?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Ar mhaith leath an nasc seo a oscailt sa bhrabhsálaí, nó arbh fhearr leat é a chur leis an ngearrthaisce?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Ná hoscail naisc ó dhaoine nach bhfuil muinín agat astu!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Seoladh IP neamhbhailí nó imreoir anaithnid

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
translation: Tá uasmhéid %s ag an mbasbharra saincheaptha %s

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Níl imreoir ar bith ar líne faoi láthair ag an mbasbharra saincheaptha %s

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
translation: Tá luach %2$s ag an mbasbharra saincheaptha %1$s
Níor rinneadh cóip de bhloc ar bith

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Athrú ar bith. Ní oibreoir é an t-imreoir

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: Tá an %s is cóngarach ag %s (%s bloic ar shiúl)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: Tá in %s is gaire ag %s (%s bloc ar shiúl)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Athrú ar bith. Is oibreoir é cheana an t-imreoir
Ní féidir cluiche áitiúil a óstáil

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Ní féidir leis an mbloc a chur
Socraíodh ionad athghiniúna go %s, %s, %s [%s] ar %s le haghaidh %s
Ní féidir leis an t-aonán a ghairm

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Tá clib cheana féin ar an sprioc nó tá an iomarca clibe aige

source_string: Target does not have this tag
translation: Níl an chlib seo ag an sprioc

source_string: Failed to connect to the server
translation: Theip ar cheangal leis an bhfreastalaí
agus ní féidir iad a athshlánú.

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!

source_string: Add infinite members and play online with up to §d%d§r friends
translation: Cuir iliomad ballaí leis/léi agus imir ar líne le suas go §d%d§r cairde

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: Thit inneoin ar %1$s agus bascadh í/é

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: Shiúl %1$s isteach i gcachtas agus %2$s sa tóir orthu
Bádh %1$s agus iad ag iarraidh éalú ó %2$s

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block
translation: Thit bloc ar %1$s agus bascadh í/é
Fuair %1$s taithí ar an bhfuinneamh cinéiteach
Shiúil %1$s isteach i dtine agus iad ag troid le %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: Thug %1$s iarracht ar snámh i laibhe chun éalú ó %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: Dódh %1$s ina smól agus é/í ag troid le %2$s
Maraíodh %1$s agus é/í ag iarraidh %2$s a ghortú

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
%1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
%1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: Thit %1$s rófhada ar fad agus thug %2$s buille scoir dó/di le %3$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur maith leat scoradh den chluiche?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Mairfidh an leagan taispeána seo cúig lá cluiche, déan do dhícheall!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Chuaigh tú tríd do cúigiú lá, bain úsáid as %s chun íomha de do chruthú a shábháil.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Mairfidh an leagan taispeána seo ar feadh 5 lá cluiche (thart ar uair agus 40 nóiméad fíor-ama). Féach “Buanna” le haghaidh leideanna! Bain taitneamh as!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Úsáid %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s agus an luch chun bogadh thart
Bain úsáid as an luch le breathnú tharat

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Tá an t-am taispeána thart, ceannaigh an cluiche chun leanúint ar aghaidh nó cruthaigh domhan nua!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur maith leat deacracht an domhain seo a ghlasáil? Socrófar deacracht an domhain seo go %1$s agus ní bheidh tú in ann í a athrú choíche.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Seisiún neamhbhailí (tosnaigh arís an cluiche agus an lainseálaí)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Níl na freastalaithe fíordheimhnithe inrochtana faoi láthair. Bain triail arís le do thoil.

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid
